title: install.md: update golang dependency
body:
After commit 92ce0bdf, golang dependency for compiling is 1.12 or higher.

Signed-off-by: Lu Jingxiao <lujingxiao@huawei.com>

comments.body:
golang >= 1.12 is required, otherwise we'll get error when `make`:
```bash
[root@HGH1000059941 buildah]# make
GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor -ldflags '-X main.GitCommit=8fd3148 -X main.buildInfo=1575946937 -X main.cniVersion=v0.7.1'  -o buildah -tags "seccomp selinux    " ./cmd/buildah
go build github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/cgroups: module requires Go 1.12
```

Please help to check this PR, thanks~

Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

Oh my, nice catch/fix.  Thanks @jingxiaolu !
LGTM

:pushpin: Commit 9267732 has been approved by `rhatdan`
